pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh lines 9-10 and export_result.sh line 13. Path is consistent with user home directory and standard ImageJ_Data structure established in setup_imagej.sh.
Verified in setup_task.sh line 10 and export_result.sh line 14. Path is consistent with setup and results directory structure.

Downloaded and analyzed the Blobs (25K) sample image from https://samples.fiji.sc/blobs.png (256x254 pixel PNG). Applied Otsu's threshold (threshold=119) and labeled connected components using scipy.ndimage. After filtering particles with area >= 50 pixels (as specified in task description), found 59 particles. This is within the metadata's expected range of [40, 80].
Same analysis as above. 59 particles is less than the max of 80, confirming the range [40, 80] is correct.

Analyzed Blobs (25K) image with scikit-image regionprops to calculate solidity (area/convex_area) for all particles with area >= 50 pixels. The minimum solidity value across all tested thresholds ranges from 0.854 to 0.877. With Otsu's threshold (119), minimum solidity = 0.8782. This value is NOT within the claimed range of [0.6, 0.85] - it exceeds the upper bound.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the published Blobs (25K) sample image (256x254 PNG, publicly available at https://samples.fiji.sc/blobs.png). This is a real, non-synthetic sample image. Particle analysis with Otsu thresholding yields 59 particles with area >= 50 pixels, with solidity values ranging from 0.8782 (minimum) to 0.9797 (maximum). The expected particle count range [40, 80] is verified as correct. However, the expected minimum solidity range [0.6, 0.85] is contradicted by analysis showing actual minimum solidity of 0.8782, which exceeds the upper bound of 0.85. Output files are saved to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/. The verifier checks for CSV existence, solidity column presence, row count within range, text file existence, and consistency between reported and actual minimum solidity values.
